benefits.description: Unlimited supply of energy, immediate effect within 2 minutes. Energy levels similar to being 20 years old. Energy levels decreased slightly by day 7 but maintained at increased level.
Sleep patterns changed and modulated by sun cycles. Circadian rhythms showed full control over behavior. Sleep became dependent on natural light cycles.
New emotions of joy. Pleasant feelings and pleasure. Life became more enjoyable. Feelings of physical pleasure 3 times more than before.
Improved sleep quality allowing better cognitive function after disruptions.

side_effects.description: Problems with eye muscles, did not focus correctly. Small exercise solved the problem.

protocol_notes: Tested two versions: Peptiline (did not work) and Russian Peptide (effective). Russian Peptide source: Lab synthesis. Sublingual administration takes 2-3 minutes. Subject reports being in ketosis during trial. Also experimenting with poliprenols. Plan to continue 3-month cycles. Producer sends peptides abroad by request.
